title: Romeo und Julia auf dem Dorfe
writer: Horst Budjuhn, Rudolf Hägni, Gottfried Keller
actors: Margrit Winter, Erwin Kohlund, Emil Gyr
plot: A few leagues from Seldwyla, in the Zurich countryside, two children, Sali Mantz and Vreneli Marti, form an inseparable pair of playmates. Unfortunately, their farming parents, who have always been friends, are at odds with each o...
